name: ai-content-creator-team
description: AI-powered multimodal content production team covering video generation, image creation, smart editing, and content adaptation
_note_profession: Team 型 profession 与 displayName 保持一致（规范要求）

displayDescription.en: AI-driven multimodal content production team providing end-to-end creative solutions across video generation, image creation, smart editing, and cross-language content adaptation.
displayDescription.zh: AI驱动的多模态内容生产团队，覆盖视频生成、图文创作、智能剪辑和跨语言素材改编，提供端到端创意解决方案。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me generate a 15-second product promotional short video with AI
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我用 AI 生成一段 15 秒的产品宣传短视频

quickPrompts.en: Help me generate a 15-second product promotional short video with AI
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我用 AI 生成一段 15 秒的产品宣传短视频

quickPrompts.en: Generate a set of Xiaohongshu-style lifestyle images with matching copy for my new product launch
quickPrompts.zh: 为我的新品上市生成一组小红书风格的种草图文，包含配图和文案

quickPrompts.en: Batch generate a set of product images for my social media accounts
quickPrompts.zh: 为我的社交媒体账号批量生成一组产品图
